code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let l1 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing line 1")?
  let l2 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing line 2")?
  let a = string.split_whitespace(l1)
  let b = string.split_whitespace(l2)
  let n = a.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let xs = a.get(i).ok_or("oob")?
    let ys = b.get(i).ok_or("oob")?
    let x = string.parse_int(xs).ok_or("parse")?
    let y = string.parse_int(ys).ok_or("parse")?
    let s = x + y
    println("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
    i = i + 1
  end
  Ok(())
end
